Description
com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
 

  • Uses of TeamEvent in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event

    Subclasses of TeamEvent in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TeamCreateEvent
    Fired when a new team is about to be created.
    class 
    TeamDeleteEvent
    Fired when a team is about to be deleted.
    class 
    TeamJoinEvent
    Fired when a player is about to join a team.
    class 
    TeamLeaveEvent
    Fired when a player is about to leave (or be removed from) a team.
    class 
    TeamRoleChangeEvent
    Fired when a team member's role is about to change.
